title: Seaborne coal suffers in 2025 as China burns less and produces more
section_path: Seaborne coal suffers in 2025 as China burns less and produces more
section_path_text: Seaborne coal suffers in 2025 as China burns less and produces more
summary:
Main
Global seaborne coal flows suffered in 2025 due to significantly lower imports from China. This is a trend we expect to continue. Global seaborne coal flows fall over 3% in 2025
China imported over 11% less seaborne coal in 2025.
